title: neolepisorus lastii
intro: Neolepisorus lastii, also known as the Last's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Neolepisorus lastii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
